requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — TR CU 020/2011 + GOST CISPR 15
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——TR CU 020/2011 + GOST CISPR 15
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——TR CU 020/2011 + GOST CISPR 15

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Armenian market must comply with the EMC Technical Regulation TR CU 020/2011 (Electromagnetic compatibility of technical means). Radio-disturbance (emission) requirements for lighting equipment are demonstrated against GOST CISPR 15 (the GOST adoption of CISPR 15: Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), covering conducted emissions on the mains terminals (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated emissions (30 MHz–300 MHz). Conformity is shown via an EAC certificate or declaration of conformity issued through an accredited EAEU body, and the EAC mark is applied. Luminaires with integrated radio functionality (e.g., Bluetooth or Wi-Fi smart lighting) may additionally fall under EAEU radio-equipment requirements (TR EAEU 018 and related radio-frequency authorisation).
summary.zh: 在亚美尼亚市场销售的 LED 灯具须符合 EMC 技术法规 TR CU 020/2011（技术设备的电磁兼容性）。照明设备的无线电骚扰（发射）要求依据 GOST CISPR 15（CISPR 15 的 GOST 采用版：电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）证明，涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。合格性通过 EAEU 认可机构出具的 EAC 合格证书或符合性声明证明，并加贴 EAC 标志。集成无线功能的灯具（如蓝牙或 Wi-Fi 智能照明）还可能须符合 EAEU 无线电设备要求（TR EAEU 018 及相关无线电频率核准）。
summary.zht: 在亞美尼亞市場銷售的 LED 燈具須符合 EMC 技術法規 TR CU 020/2011（技術設備的電磁兼容性）。照明設備的無線電騷擾（發射）要求依據 GOST CISPR 15（CISPR 15 的 GOST 採用版：電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）證明，涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。合格性通過 EAEU 認可機構出具的 EAC 合格證書或符合性聲明證明，並加貼 EAC 標誌。集成無線功能的燈具（如藍牙或 Wi-Fi 智能照明）還可能須符合 EAEU 無線電設備要求（TR EAEU 018 及相關無線電頻率核准）。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union on electromagnetic compatibility of technical means
GOST CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (GOST adoption of CISPR 15)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant categories). Testing is conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not accepted under the EAEU TR CU 020/2011 conformity-assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被 EAEU TR CU 020/2011 合格评定路径所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被 EAEU TR CU 020/2011 合格評定路徑所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: GOST CISPR 15 and GB 17743 both derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized and the matching 220/380 V 50 Hz mains removes any supply-related re-design. The gap is procedural and documentary: (1) Armenia requires conformity under the EMC regulation TR CU 020/2011 with an EAC certificate or declaration through an accredited EAEU body, separate from the TR CU 004 safety route; (2) testing should be against the GOST CISPR 15 text by a laboratory accepted within the EAEU accreditation system — CN CCC reports are not transferable; (3) an in-country registered importer and Russian-language documentation are required; (4) if the luminaire incorporates radio functionality, EAEU radio-equipment requirements (TR EAEU 018 / radio-frequency authorisation) additionally apply.
gap.zh: GOST CISPR 15 与 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调，220/380 V 50 Hz 电源匹配消除了供电相关的改设计。差距在于程序与文件：（1）亚美尼亚要求依据 EMC 法规 TR CU 020/2011 合规，由 EAEU 认可机构出具 EAC 证书或声明，独立于 TR CU 004 安全路径；（2）应由 EAEU 认可体系内接受的实验室按 GOST CISPR 15 文本检测——中国 CCC 报告不可转用；（3）须有进口国注册进口商及俄文文件；（4）若灯具集成无线功能，还须适用 EAEU 无线电设备要求（TR EAEU 018／无线电频率核准）。
gap.zht: GOST CISPR 15 與 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調，220/380 V 50 Hz 電源匹配消除了供電相關的改設計。差距在於程序與文件：（1）亞美尼亞要求依據 EMC 法規 TR CU 020/2011 合規，由 EAEU 認可機構出具 EAC 證書或聲明，獨立於 TR CU 004 安全路徑；（2）應由 EAEU 認可體系內接受的實驗室按 GOST CISPR 15 文本檢測——中國 CCC 報告不可轉用；（3）須有進口國註冊進口商及俄文文件；（4）若燈具集成無線功能，還須適用 EAEU 無線電設備要求（TR EAEU 018／無線電頻率核准）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity under TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) required before placing the luminaire on the Armenian / EAEU market; emissions assessed against GOST CISPR 15
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Armenia require EAC EMC conformity under TR CU 020/2011, with emissions assessed against GOST CISPR 15. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived) and the 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so the burden is primarily procedural — a separate EAC EMC assessment through an accredited EAEU body, an in-country importer, and Russian-language documentation. Smart luminaires with radio functions may additionally require EAEU radio-equipment compliance. Chinese CCC EMC reports do not satisfy the EAC pathway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入亚美尼亚的 LED 灯具须依据 TR CU 020/2011 取得 EAC 电磁兼容合格，发射依据 GOST CISPR 15 评定。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，220/380 V 50 Hz 电网与中国匹配，故负担主要为程序性——经 EAEU 认可机构进行独立 EAC 电磁兼容评定、进口国进口商及俄文文件。集成无线功能的智能灯具还可能须符合 EAEU 无线电设备合规。中国 CCC 电磁兼容报告不满足 EAC 路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入亞美尼亞的 LED 燈具須依據 TR CU 020/2011 取得 EAC 電磁兼容合格，發射依據 GOST CISPR 15 評定。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，220/380 V 50 Hz 電網與中國匹配，故負擔主要為程序性——經 EAEU 認可機構進行獨立 EAC 電磁兼容評定、進口國進口商及俄文文件。集成無線功能的智能燈具還可能須符合 EAEU 無線電設備合規。中國 CCC 電磁兼容報告不滿足 EAC 路徑。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — TR CU 020/2011 + GOST IEC 61547
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——TR CU 020/2011 + GOST IEC 61547
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——TR CU 020/2011 + GOST IEC 61547

summary.en: TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) also covers immunity: technical means placed on the Armenian / EAEU market must maintain adequate immunity in their intended electromagnetic environment. For lighting equipment, immunity is demonstrated against GOST IEC 61547 (the GOST adoption of IEC 61547: Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements). Tests include electrostatic discharge (IEC 61000-4-2), electrical fast transient/burst (IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted RF disturbances (IEC 61000-4-6), power-frequency magnetic field (IEC 61000-4-8), and voltage dips/interruptions (IEC 61000-4-11). Immunity evidence forms part of the EAC EMC conformity assessment under TR CU 020/2011.
summary.zh: TR CU 020/2011（EMC）也涵盖抗扰度：投放亚美尼亚／EAEU 市场的技术设备须在预期电磁环境中保持足够抗扰度。对照明设备，抗扰度依据 GOST IEC 61547（IEC 61547 的 GOST 采用版：一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求）证明。试验项目包括静电放电（IEC 61000-4-2）、电快速瞬变/脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）、传导射频骚扰（IEC 61000-4-6）、工频磁场（IEC 61000-4-8）及电压暂降/中断（IEC 61000-4-11）。抗扰度证据构成 TR CU 020/2011 下 EAC 电磁兼容合格评定的一部分。
summary.zht: TR CU 020/2011（EMC）也涵蓋抗擾度：投放亞美尼亞／EAEU 市場的技術設備須在預期電磁環境中保持足夠抗擾度。對照明設備，抗擾度依據 GOST IEC 61547（IEC 61547 的 GOST 採用版：一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求）證明。試驗項目包括靜電放電（IEC 61000-4-2）、電快速瞬變/脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）、傳導射頻騷擾（IEC 61000-4-6）、工頻磁場（IEC 61000-4-8）及電壓暫降/中斷（IEC 61000-4-11）。抗擾度證據構成 TR CU 020/2011 下 EAC 電磁兼容合格評定的一部分。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union on electromagnetic compatibility of technical means
GOST IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (GOST adoption of IEC 61547)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), technically equivalent to IEC 61547. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is less strictly enforced than the CN emissions standard GB 17743; CCC for CN luminaires generally focuses more on safety and emissions than on immunity. A product tested to IEC 61547 immunity levels will generally meet or exceed the CN GB/T 18595 requirements due to the shared IEC technical base.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743；针对中国灯具的 CCC 通常更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。因共同采用 IEC 技术基础，按 IEC 61547 抗扰度等级测试的产品通常能满足或超越中国 GB/T 18595 要求。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743；針對中國燈具的 CCC 通常更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。因共同採用 IEC 技術基礎，按 IEC 61547 抗擾度等級測試的產品通常能滿足或超越中國 GB/T 18595 要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547)

gap.en: GOST IEC 61547 and GB/T 18595 both derive from IEC 61547, so the immunity content is largely harmonized. The difference is mandatory status and procedure: in Armenia, immunity is part of the binding EAC EMC conformity assessment under TR CU 020/2011, whereas in China GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard not universally enforced for all luminaire categories. Practically the gap is documentary — the EAC EMC technical file must contain immunity evidence (GOST IEC 61547), while CN CCC documentation may not include equivalent immunity reports. Testing should be by a laboratory accepted within the EAEU accreditation system; CN reports are not directly transferable, and Russian-language documentation plus an in-country importer are required.
gap.zh: GOST IEC 61547 与 GB/T 18595 均源自 IEC 61547，抗扰度内容基本协调。区别在于强制性属性与程序：在亚美尼亚，抗扰度是 TR CU 020/2011 下具约束力的 EAC 电磁兼容合格评定的一部分，而在中国 GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准，并非对所有灯具类别普遍执行。实际差距为文件性——EAC 电磁兼容技术文件须包含抗扰度证据（GOST IEC 61547），而中国 CCC 文件可能不含等效抗扰度报告。检测应由 EAEU 认可体系内接受的实验室进行；中国报告不可直接转用，且须有俄文文件及进口国进口商。
gap.zht: GOST IEC 61547 與 GB/T 18595 均源自 IEC 61547，抗擾度內容基本協調。區別在於強制性屬性與程序：在亞美尼亞，抗擾度是 TR CU 020/2011 下具約束力的 EAC 電磁兼容合格評定的一部分，而在中國 GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準，並非對所有燈具類別普遍執行。實際差距為文件性——EAC 電磁兼容技術文件須包含抗擾度證據（GOST IEC 61547），而中國 CCC 文件可能不含等效抗擾度報告。檢測應由 EAEU 認可體系內接受的實驗室進行；中國報告不可直接轉用，且須有俄文文件及進口國進口商。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity is part of the EAC conformity assessment under TR CU 020/2011; demonstrated against GOST IEC 61547
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires must satisfy the EMC immunity requirements of TR CU 020/2011, demonstrated against GOST IEC 61547. Unlike China — where GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard not universally enforced — immunity is part of the binding EAC EMC assessment in Armenia. The technical content is largely harmonized with IEC 61547, so products already tested to GB/T 18595 may have a reduced re-testing burden, but the EAC technical file must contain adequate immunity evidence, testing must be within the EAEU accreditation system, and Russian-language documentation plus an in-country importer are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具须满足 TR CU 020/2011 的电磁抗扰度要求，依据 GOST IEC 61547 证明。与中国不同——中国 GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准且非普遍执行——在亚美尼亚，抗扰度是具约束力的 EAC 电磁兼容评定的一部分。技术内容与 IEC 61547 基本协调，因此已按 GB/T 18595 测试的产品可能减少重新测试负担，但 EAC 技术文件须包含充分的抗扰度证据，检测须在 EAEU 认可体系内进行，且须有俄文文件及进口国进口商。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具須滿足 TR CU 020/2011 的電磁抗擾度要求，依據 GOST IEC 61547 證明。與中國不同——中國 GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準且非普遍執行——在亞美尼亞，抗擾度是具約束力的 EAC 電磁兼容評定的一部分。技術內容與 IEC 61547 基本協調，因此已按 GB/T 18595 測試的產品可能減少重新測試負擔，但 EAC 技術文件須包含充分的抗擾度證據，檢測須在 EAEU 認可體系內進行，且須有俄文文件及進口國進口商。
